items.name: agentrun
items.title: AgentRun
items.description: Vertical run trace: one row per step with done/active/pending/error state, connector rail, mono timestamps.

items.name: chatmessage
items.title: ChatMessage
items.description: Agent-thread message: bot chip or user avatar, meta row, hover copy/retry actions, streaming caret.

items.name: citation
items.title: Citation + SourceList
items.description: Inline superscript source chips + the source list they resolve to.

items.name: confirmation
items.title: Confirmation
items.description: Inline approval card for agent actions — pending shows Approve/Reject, settled shows a status line. Ringed accent (or danger) border while pending.

items.name: conversation
items.title: Conversation
items.description: Stick-to-bottom thread viewport: keeps pinned to the latest message while streaming (ResizeObserver), shows a "Jump to latest" pill when the reader scrolls up.

items.name: documentcard
items.title: DocumentCard
items.description: Inline document artifact — header with copy + expand, content clipped at `collapsedHeight` with a paper fade; measured height animates open.

items.name: feedbackbar
items.title: FeedbackBar
items.description: Quiet action row under an assistant message: thumbs up/down (toggle), copy, regenerate.

items.name: generatedimage
items.title: GeneratedImage
items.description: Image-generation frame with queued / generating (pulsing dot-grid on dark) / complete (fade-in, scrim, hover actions) / error (retry) states.

items.name: modelselector
items.title: ModelSelector
items.description: Compact model picker for composers: current model + provider on the trigger, panel with hint lines and badges.

items.name: player
items.title: Player
items.description: Audio player — seekable waveform (drag or click), ±10s skip, play/pause, mute, tabular timestamps. Expose a ref for `jumpTo` and pair with Transcript via `onTimeChange`.

items.name: promptcomposer
items.title: PromptComposer
items.description: Agent input: auto textarea, attach + voice buttons, ink send. Enter sends, Shift+Enter breaks.

items.name: promptsteps
items.title: PromptSteps
items.description: Keyboard-first inline question wizard — numbered options (1–9 keys), arrows to highlight, Enter to confirm, Esc dismisses, ←/Shift-Tab goes back; "Other" is an inline input. Calls `onComplete` with all answers.

items.name: reasoning
items.title: Reasoning
items.description: Collapsible "thinking" block for model reasoning — pulsing brain glyph while streaming, then "Thought for Ns".

items.name: richcomposer
items.title: RichComposer
items.description: Composer with @-mention chips and /-commands — typing a trigger opens a filtered list above the composer (arrows + Enter, groups supported); mentions insert as atomic chips that delete as one unit; Enter submits, Shift+Enter breaks.

items.name: sandbox
items.title: Sandbox
items.description: Collapsible code-run panel — mono title, soft ring while running / on error, tabbed Output & Code panes. Opens itself on error by default.

items.name: selectionquote
items.title: SelectionQuote
items.description: Select-to-quote affordance — wrap message content; selecting text floats a small toolbar above the selection (flips below near the top, clamped to the container). Actions receive the selected text.

items.name: sourcecard
items.title: SourceCard
items.description: Web-source card for grounded answers — optional 16:9 thumbnail, favicon + domain row, title, 3-line clamped description. `variant="plain"` for dense lists.

items.name: suggestions
items.title: Suggestions
items.description: Prompt-suggestion chip row for empty chats and follow-ups.

items.name: task
items.title: Task
items.description: Rail-connected list of agent actions — icon rows joined by hairline connectors; last row's rail is hidden. `streaming` pulses the newest row.

items.name: todo
items.title: Todo
items.description: Collapsible agent checklist card — spinner while in progress, espresso check + strikethrough when done, n/total count in the header.

items.name: toolcall
items.title: ToolCall
items.description: A tool invocation receipt: mono tool name, live status (running/success/error), collapsible Input/Result body.

items.name: transcript
items.title: Transcript
items.description: Time-synced transcript — active row derives from `currentTime`, auto-scroll keeps it centered (toggleable), timestamps jump the player, optional word-level highlight via `words`.

items.name: usagemeter
items.title: UsageMeter
items.description: Budget meter: used/limit figures, fill bar that turns warning past warnAt and danger past the limit.

items.name: webpreview
items.title: WebPreview
items.description: Browser pane for agent-built UIs — reload, draft-state address bar (Enter commits, Esc reverts), desktop/tablet/mobile widths (animated), collapsible console with error badge, open-in-new-tab. Pass `children` to mock the page without an iframe.

items.name: codeblock
items.title: CodeBlock
items.description: Espresso code block with language label and working copy button.

items.name: console
items.title: Console
items.description: Log viewer — level icons/colors, tabular timestamps, per-row collapsible stack traces, sticks to the bottom while streaming and shows a "Latest" pill when scrolled up.

items.name: copyfield
items.title: CopyField
items.description: Read-only mono value with copy (and reveal, for secrets). For API keys, IPs, DNS records.

items.name: diff
items.title: Diff
items.description: Unified diff with dual line-number gutters, +/− signs, add/del row tints, and header counts.

items.name: envlist
items.title: EnvList
items.description: Environment variables card — secrets masked as •••••••• with a single reveal toggle in the header; per-row copy always copies the real value.

items.name: exception
items.title: Exception
items.description: Runtime-error card — mono type chip + message, collapsible stack frames (active frame flagged, internal frames dimmed) and an optional source excerpt with the failing line highlighted.

items.name: terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: Line-oriented console output: $ prompts, tinted ok/err/info lines, optional live caret.

items.name: barchart
items.title: BarChart
items.description: Hairline-minimal bar chart: sand bars, ink highlight window, hover tint + title tooltip.

items.name: donutchart
items.title: DonutChart
items.description: Donut with center figure + legend; hover highlights a slice. Colors default to the brand ramp.

items.name: emptystate
items.title: EmptyState
items.description: Centered empty view — leads with the action, not the absence.

items.name: keyvaluelist
items.title: KeyValueList
items.description: Label/value rows with hairline separators — resource details, DNS records, trade info.

items.name: linechart
items.title: LineChart
items.description: SVG line chart with hover crosshair + tooltip; soft area fill by default.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder — soft pulse, no shimmer.

items.name: sparkline
items.title: Sparkline
items.description: Inline trend line (SVG) — green up, red down, faint area fill. Pairs with Stat.

items.name: stat
items.title: Stat
items.description: KPI block: muted label, mono value, colored delta.

items.name: statusdot
items.title: StatusDot
items.description: Live status dot with label; `pulse` radiates for running/connected states.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Data table: uppercase micro headers, hairline rows, optional row click. Borderless — nest in `<Card padding={0}>` for a framed table.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Month grid — hairline today ring, ink selected day, ISO string in/out.

items.name: datepicker
items.title: DatePicker
items.description: Field-style trigger + Calendar popover; closes on pick, outside click, ESC.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Hairline disclosure list (FAQs, docs). Single-open by default; `multiple` allows several.

items.name: aspectratio
items.title: AspectRatio
items.description: Locks children to a fixed ratio box (fills width). Use for media, embeds, map placeholders.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar + AvatarGroup
items.description: Circular avatar — image or initials with a deterministic warm tone from `name`. `AvatarGroup` overlaps them with white keylines.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Small status pill; `dot` adds a leading status dot.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: The surface container: white, 1px sand border, 8px radius, warm shadow.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Scroll-snap strip with arrow controls and position dots. Use for galleries, template pickers, testimonial strips.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: A single disclosure row: chevron trigger + revealed body. Use for advanced options, long descriptions, log detail.

items.name: divider
items.title: Divider
items.description: 1px hairline separator; optional uppercase label; `vertical` for toolbars.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keycap for shortcut hints — mono 11px, hairline with a 2px base.

items.name: link
items.title: Link
items.description: Styled anchor. `external` adds ↗ + new tab; `standalone` makes a semibold CTA with →.

items.name: listitem
items.title: ListItem
items.description: Generic row: leading icon/media, title + description, trailing slot. Renders as div, button (`onClick`), or anchor (`href`).

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Two panes split by a draggable hairline handle (keyboard: arrow keys). Use for editor/preview, list/detail, terminal splits.

items.name: scrollarea
items.title: ScrollArea
items.description: Overflow container with the system scrollbar treatment (thin, warm, rounded). Use for bounded lists, code panes, chat logs.

items.name: tag
items.title: Tag
items.description: Chip for filters and labels; removable via `onRemove`, clickable via `onClick`.

items.name: toolbar
items.title: Toolbar
items.description: Grouped icon actions on a hairline chip — editors, chart controls, bulk bars. `value` marks active (ink).

items.name: treelist
items.title: TreeList
items.description: Collapsible tree for file/nav hierarchies. Rows take icons + mono counts; branches toggle on click.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Inline banner: white surface, hairline border, tone-colored icon. For page-level notices — use Toast for transient events.

items.name: banner
items.title: Banner
items.description: Full-width strip above the app chrome — trials, incidents, announcements. One per view, max.

items.name: confirmdialog
items.title: ConfirmDialog
items.description: Destructive-action preset of Dialog; optional type-to-confirm gate.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Centered modal with dimmed overlay, springy scale-in, ESC/overlay/✕ close.

items.name: loader
items.title: Loader
items.description: Text-treatment loading state (no spinner) — `pulse` breathes opacity, `shimmer` sweeps a highlight through the label; optional staggered dots.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: 4px ink progress bar for usage meters and multi-step flows.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Standalone loading indicator (Button has its own via `loading`).

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast + ToastStack
items.description: Dark (espresso) notification card; wrap in `ToastStack` to pin bottom-right.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover/focus tooltip with 200ms delay and spring pop. Wrap any trigger element.

items.name: filedrop
items.title: FileDrop
items.description: Dashed dropzone — click or drag; ink border on hover/dragover.

items.name: filetile
items.title: FileTile
items.description: File row with type icon (inferred from extension), size/status meta, progress or error state.

items.name: filetypeicon
items.title: FileTypeIcon
items.description: Typed file glyph with colored extension chip — maps 20 common extensions to icon + color.

items.name: paymentcard
items.title: PaymentCard
items.description: Payment card visual for trading / finance surfaces — espresso, caramel, or paper; `frozen` grays it out.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: The action button — primary for the one main action per view, secondary/ghost for the rest.

items.name: buttongroup
items.title: ButtonGroup
items.description: Attaches adjacent Buttons/IconButtons into one segment (shared borders, squared inner corners). Use for tightly related actions of equal rank: zoom in/out, prev/next, split-button patterns.

items.name: buttontile
items.title: ButtonTile + ButtonTileGroup
items.description: Large selectable tile — plan pickers, onboarding choices. Wrap in `ButtonTileGroup columns={n}`.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox with springy check pop; supports a muted `description` second line.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Searchable select — single, or multi with removable chips. Keyboard: arrows + Enter, Backspace removes last chip.

items.name: digitentry
items.title: DigitEntry
items.description: OTP/PIN input — one cell per digit, auto-advance, paste-aware, `autocomplete="one-time-code"`.

items.name: iconbutton
items.title: IconButton
items.description: Square icon-only button for toolbars, card actions, and dense rows; `label` is required (a11y + tooltip).

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text input; renders bare, or as a full field when `label`/`hint`/`error` are set.

items.name: inputgroup
items.title: InputGroup
items.description: An input with leading/trailing addons inside one bordered row. String addons render as tinted cells (units, protocols); node addons render bare (ghost Buttons, Icons).

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Standalone field label for custom controls that lack a built-in `label` prop. Pair via `htmlFor`; `required` adds the red asterisk, `hint` a muted inline note.

items.name: radio
items.title: Radio
items.description: Radio for 2–5 mutually exclusive options; group with a shared `name`.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Styled native select with chevron; options as strings, `{value,label}` objects, or `<option>` children.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Range input with ink fill and hairline track; label + live value optional.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: On/off toggle with springy thumb — for settings that apply immediately (otherwise use Checkbox).

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multiline input with the same field wrapper as Input (`label`/`hint`/`error`).

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle + ToggleGroup
items.description: A pressed-state button for on/off formatting-style options (bold, grid view, mute). Use `icon` alone for toolbars, or icon + children for labeled toggles.

items.name: icon
items.title: Icon
items.description: Renders one of the 65 curated Lucide icons shipped in `assets/icons/`, inheriting `currentColor`.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.description: Path trail with chevron separators; last item is the current page.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Desktop-app style menu bar (File / Edit / View). Click opens; hovering across bar switches menus while open. Items share the Menu item shape (icon, kbd, danger, separator).

items.name: pagecontrol
items.title: PageControl
items.description: Carousel dots — active dot stretches to an ink pill.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Numbered pager with ellipsis collapsing; active page is an ink chip.

items.name: segmentedcontrol
items.title: SegmentedControl
items.description: Inline 2–5-way toggle on a sand track; active segment is a white hairline chip. For views/ranges — use Tabs for page sections.

items.name: sidenav
items.title: SideNav
items.description: The product sidebar: brand row, grouped nav with icons/badges, pinned footer. 240px on `--surface-subtle`.

items.name: steps
items.title: Steps
items.description: Numbered progress rail — vertical for agent task logs, horizontal for wizards.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Underline tabs with a spring-sliding caramel ink bar. Controlled: pass `value` + `onChange`.

items.name: topnav
items.title: TopNav
items.description: Sticky blurred header: optional leading slot, display-font title, right-aligned actions.

items.name: commandpalette
items.title: CommandPalette
items.description: ⌘K palette: search, grouped commands, full keyboard nav (↑↓, ↵, Esc), Kbd-hinted footer.

items.name: contextmenu
items.title: ContextMenu
items.description: Right-click menu anchored at the cursor. Wrap the target; items share the Menu item shape.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Side panel for details and multi-field edits that shouldn't leave the page.

items.name: hovercard
items.title: HoverCard
items.description: Rich preview on hover/focus (350ms in, 150ms out). Use for people, repos, tickets — anywhere a link deserves a glance-preview.

items.name: menu
items.title: Menu
items.description: Dropdown action menu on any trigger. Items take icons, shortcut hints, separators, and a danger style.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Anchored floating panel for filters, pickers, help. Closes on outside click / ESC.

items.name: block-activity-feed
items.title: Activity feed block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: activity feed.

items.name: block-app-shell
items.title: App shell block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: app shell.

items.name: block-faq
items.title: Faq block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: faq.

items.name: block-hero
items.title: Hero block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: hero.

items.name: block-login
items.title: Login block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: login.

items.name: block-not-found
items.title: Not found block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: not found.

items.name: block-pricing
items.title: Pricing block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: pricing.

items.name: block-settings
items.title: Settings block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: settings.

items.name: block-stats-dashboard
items.title: Stats dashboard block
items.description: Pre-composed Meridian section: stats dashboard.
